spec_match.rationale: Renders a real Reporting API `crash` payload shape including the new `stack` array and cluster key — matches the spec.

interactive.rationale: Paste-or-preset workflow, viewer re-renders frames on input, top-frame highlight and cluster key are computed live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index description matches the page exactly.

edge_cases.rationale: Missing: malformed payload handling, empty stack array, oversized stack (truncation), and reason !== 'unresponsive' branches.

openQuestions.title: Add a malformed payload preset
openQuestions.detail: Show what the viewer does with malformed JSON or a missing `stack` field — a robust report aggregator must handle these.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate truncation
openQuestions.detail: Chrome truncates very deep stacks. Add a preset with 200+ frames showing the truncation indicator and how it affects the cluster key.

openQuestions.title: Show the reason !== 'unresponsive' branch
openQuestions.detail: The new stack array is only included when reason is `unresponsive`. Add a preset for reason `oom` and reason `crashed` so authors see when the stack will be absent.

summary: Cleanly designed payload viewer that nails the spec; only gaps are edge-case presets (malformed / truncated / other reasons).
